name: compare_properties
description: Generate a structured side-by-side comparison of 2–4 listings against the user's profile. Returns each listing's key attributes, fit scores by dimension, and a comparative narrative identifying the strongest fit, the best value, and the highest risk. Call this when the user asks to compare specific properties.

listing_ids.description: UUIDs of the 2–4 listings to compare.

focus.description: Comparison focus lens. 'family' boosts education and safety dimensions; 'investment' boosts investment and developer dimensions.
